title: Copper Nanoparticles In Gelatin
description: This is based on Hybrid Copper Complex-Derived Conductive patterns Printed On Polyimide Substrates by Lee, Jeong et al, Met. Mat.Int. Vol. 18, No 3 (2012) for the formate reduction of copper oxide and a patent I read ages ago that I have lost the reference for about copper nanoparticles in gelatin and peptides. What I think is new here is putting these two ideas together.
